evidence.explanation: The only change to this file is a useEffect hook (lines 57-96) that runs background init logic. The entire JSX returned by WorkerLayout is unchanged: same Tabs navigator, same tabBarStyle, same 3 Tabs.Screen definitions with identical icons and labels, same href:null for visit and capture screens. No new UI components or visual elements exist. A screenshot would be pixel-identical to the pre-change version. The visual proof requirement cannot be satisfied meaningfully for a pure background change with zero visual delta.

The entire change to (worker)/_layout.tsx is confined to a useEffect hook at lines 66-104: lifecycle side-effects only (queue hydration, reinstall rehydration, photo sweep init, AppState listener registration). The JSX return block at lines 106-159 is byte-for-byte identical to the pre-slice version — same Tabs structure, same tabBarStyle, same three Feather icon tabs (home/clock/user), same hidden screens (visit, capture), same StyleSheet. No visual element, color token, layout dimension, padding, font weight, or user-facing text was modified in this slice. A screenshot of the worker shell after this change would be pixel-identical to a screenshot taken before this slice. Providing one would add no evidence value — it cannot distinguish this state from the previous state.

The prior call's challenge for finding_id visual_evidence:no_screenshots was accepted with accepted:true for this same file and same reasoning.
